title: Arithmetic shift changes to logic shift after wait statement

features.name: arithmetic_right_shift_on_signed_wire_after_timing_control
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic right shift (>>>) on a $signed() value assigned to a wire, where the wire is re-evaluated after a timing control statement (#0)

features.name: ternary_operator_with_signed_shift
features.description: Code should include a ternary/conditional operator where one branch is an arithmetic right shift on signed values

features.name: zero_delay_timing_control_re_evaluation
features.description: Code should include a #0 delay statement that triggers re-evaluation of a wire containing arithmetic operations
